description_long: This is a rustic wooden bench constructed from several thick, dark brown planks arranged horizontally to form the seat. The bench features a simple, robust design with two wide, blocky supports at each end, connected by a horizontal stretcher for added stability. The wood surface displays a visible grain pattern and some weathering, suggesting it is suitable for outdoor use. There are no backrests or armrests, making the bench accessible from either side. The overall form is low and wide, providing ample seating space for multiple people. Its sturdy build and natural finish make it ideal for parks, gardens, or other urban outdoor settings.
description: A sturdy, rustic wooden bench made of dark brown planks with blocky supports and no backrest or armrests. The weathered wood and simple design make it suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, highlighting the horizontal planks and blocky end supports.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the length of the bench and the thickness of the wooden planks.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the same plank arrangement and support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, again showing the bench's length and plank thickness.
attribute_leg_design: two wide blocky wooden supports with a horizontal stretcher
